issue.message: Wrong orientation? No orientation specified, and the default is horizontal, yet this layout has multiple children where at least one has `layout_width="match_parent"`
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/gray_900` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@android:style/Theme.Holo`)
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/gray_900` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@android:style/Theme.Holo`)
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/gray_900` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@android:style/Theme.Holo`)
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/gray_900` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@android:style/Theme.Holo`)
